PARTIES FROM CONSOLIDATED CASE NUMBER 454195 ADDED TO LEAD CASE NUMBER 621016 FOR MAILING OF COURT NOTICES. ATTORNEY DAVID KORNBLUH AND ATTORNEY JESSE MILLER COULD NOT BE LINKED TO THE LEAD CASE BECAUSE THEY REPRESENT PLAINTIFF IN ONE MATTER AND DEFENDANT IN THE OTHER MATTER.

NOTICE OF MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ON MAY-23-2007 AT 2:30 PM IN DEPARTMENT 622. NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, COURT TRIAL SET FOR JUN-11-2007 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON DEC-15-2006 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-05-2007 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT JMA VENTURES, LLC'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CUD-06-619980, CUD-07-621016 WITH CASE CGC-06-454195. MOTION IS GRANTED AS TO CASE #454195 AND CASE #621016. THE ISSUES ARE THE SAME AND THERE IS NO PREJUDICE TO THE PLAINTIFF IN THE UNLAWFUL DETAINER ACTION, THE LATTER BEING A COMMON REASON FOR DENIAL OF CONSOLIDATION. THE MOTION IS DENIED AS TO CASE # 619980, WHICH EFFECTIVELY WAS DISMISSED WHEN THE DEMURRER WAS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THE CONSOLIDATED ACTIONS ARE HEREBY CONSOLIDATED UNDER CASE # 621016 FOR ALL PURPOSES. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

MASTER CALENDAR COURT

Off Calendar May-21-2007 Off Calendar

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CUD-06-619980, CUD-07-621016 WITH CASE CGC-06-454195
Off Calendar Apr-05-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCE:
David Reidy, Esq. of Reed Smith, 415-699-5933 for defendant and moving party JMA Ventures
Angela Storey, Esq. of Miller, Morton, Calillat & Nevis, 408-292-1765 for plaintiff and opposing party Elegant Illusions

RULING:
ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING
DEFENDANT JMA VENTURES, LLC's MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CUD-06-619980, CUD-07-621016 WITH CASE CGC-06-454195. MOTION IS GRANTED AS TO CASE #454195 AND CASE #621016. THE ISSUES ARE THE SAME AND THERE IS NO PREJUDICE TO THE PLAINTIFF IN THE UNLAWFUL DETAINER ACTION, THE LATTER BEING A COMMON REASON FOR DENIAL OF CONSOLIDATION. THE MOTION IS DENIED AS TO CASE # 619980, WHICH EFFECTIVELY WAS DISMISSED WHEN THE DEMURRER WAS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. The consolidated actions are hereby consolidated under case # 621016 for all purposes. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (302/PJM/PB) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-06-2006 Set For Trial On Jun-11-07 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On May-23-07 At 02:30 P.M. In Dept 622
